question: My TitanBook is draining battery really fast in sleep mode. Should I buy a replacement battery?
expected_context: TitanBook AI Workstation, SYS-ERR-0x88, Conflict in Windows standby protocols, Update System BIOS to v2.4 or higher
expected_answer: No replacement is needed. Update the System BIOS to v2.4 or higher to resolve the Windows standby protocol conflict.

expected_answer: You have exceeded the rate limit. Implement an exponential backoff algorithm in your client application.

expected_answer: The error is caused by reaching the maximum activations. Please proceed with the Offline Verification resolution step.

question: My TitanBook keeps randomly shutting down and shows SYS-ERR-0x92.
expected_context: SYS-ERR-0x92, Loose or defective thermal sensor ribbon cable, Reseat thermal sensor
expected_answer: This is caused by a loose or defective thermal sensor ribbon cable. You need to reseat the thermal sensor.
